title: Jetstream Sam's Murasama
description: The resource pack adds to minecraft the ability to change your sword to Sema's katana from the game Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance. To change the katana, rename your sword to "Murasama"
body:
![sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DzjmDa5Z/images/8cb67e881f9caaa75cfada9e2d7605d210b56701.png)
### This resource pack is for fans of Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance. It adds the texture and model of a sword inspired by the Jetstream Sam katana - "Murasama" to the game. (To get a katana, it must be given the name shown above in brackets.)
###  

* Use any part of this resource pack in other projects If in doubt, you can always reach me on Discord🌐 Join our communities:
